summary: A polarising fragment of Dead history – praised by some as an intriguing oddity, dismissed by others as trash, with no clear info on recording source or quality.
review: The few reviews are split: a couple of listeners revel in the rarity and “progressive art” feel of this tape, while another reviewer calls it outright rubbish. No concrete details about soundboard vs. audience sources or mix clarity are provided, leaving the technical side ambiguous and likely only fair.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews show both strong positive (5‑star) and strong negative (1‑star) opinions with little technical detail, leading to an average rating around the middle of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentions specific soundboard or audience details; comments are vague about tape fidelity, suggesting only a moderate listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided on set structure or song flow.
